user_query:
Please import my April finance data into my local tracker and produce three reports. Read these files under input/:
- input/transactions.csv (columns: date, description, category, amount)
- input/budgets.json (monthly budgets by category)
- input/schedules.csv (scheduled EMIs and one-time payments with due dates)

Tasks:
1) Use the data to create/update categories (including any custom ones), set monthly budgets, insert all transactions, and register the scheduled payments. Assume today is 2026-04-10 for reminders.
2) Generate a weekly spending digest for the week 2026-04-06 through 2026-04-12 (inclusive) and write it to output/weekly_digest_2026-04-06_to_2026-04-12.json. Include per-category totals for that week and an overall total.
3) Generate an April 2026 budget status report and write it to output/budget_status_2026-04.json. For each category that appears in budgets or transactions, include: budget, spent (April only), and remaining (budget - spent). Mark overspending if spent > budget.
4) Generate upcoming payment reminders for the next 14 days from 2026-04-10 (inclusive) and write them to output/reminders_next_14_days_from_2026-04-10.json. Include each item’s type, name, amount, and due_date, sorted by due_date.
5) Export all April 2026 transactions you inserted (date, description, category, amount) sorted by date ascending to output/april_2026_transactions.csv.

Exact file paths to write:
- output/weekly_digest_2026-04-06_to_2026-04-12.json
- output/budget_status_2026-04.json
- output/reminders_next_14_days_from_2026-04-10.json
- output/april_2026_transactions.csv
